title: "I Had No Time To Hate, Because"
content:
I had no time to hate, because
    The grave would hinder me,
    And life was not so ample I
    Could finish enmity.

    Nor had I time to love; but since
    Some industry must be,
    The little toil of love, I thought,
    Was large enough for me.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in ""I Had No Time To Hate, Because""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
